definition:
1. the thread which is passed between the threads of the warp  στήμων, tela ), the woof  or weft , Lat. subtemen, (Hesiod), etc. 
2. κροκύς, the flock  or nap of woollen cloth, cloth with curly nap , (Aristophanes Comicus): in plural, μαλακαῖς κρόκαις with cloths of  soft wool , (Pindar); κρόκαισι with flocks of wool , (Sophocles Tragicus) (ML)
